articles.title_en: In photos: Kyiv’s historic Pechersk Lavra monastery burns after a Russian strike
articles.lead_en: Russia struck Kyiv overnight on June 15. The attack set fire to the Dormition Cathedral of the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra, a historic and architectural monument on the UNESCO World Heritage List.
